what: Compare vault files against database entries for drift
why: Detect files missing from database or database entries with no matching file
output: Consistency report with orphaned DB entries, unindexed files, and stale entries

success_handling.criteria: Comparison completes between all vault files and all database entries

error_handling.criteria: SQLite query throws an error during consistency check
error_handling.action: Record database error, continue to report generation with partial data

event.message: Database read failed during consistency check: {error}

decisions.condition: Database is consistent with vault files

decisions.outcome: Record drift details, proceed to generate-audit-report step
